name: bug-fab-sveltekit
description: SvelteKit adapter for the Bug-Fab wire protocol (v0.1).
author: AZgeekster

scripts.vendor:bundle: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const src=path.resolve(__dirname,'..','..','..','repo','static','bug-fab.js');const dest=path.resolve(__dirname,'static','bug-fab.js');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.warn('[vendor:bundle] upstream bundle not found at '+src+'; leaving placeholder in place.');process.exit(0);}fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dest);console.log('[vendor:bundle] copied '+src+' -> '+dest);"
scripts.build:static: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const src=path.resolve(__dirname,'static');const dest=path.resolve(__dirname,'dist','static');fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest,f));}console.log('[build:static] copied static/ -> dist/static/');"
scripts.build: svelte-package -i src/client -o dist/client && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:static
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run vendor:bundle && npm run build
